violations.text: The ice machine behind the bar was observed in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2026

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the three bay. The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026
The floor in front of the ice machine area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2026

The second floor bar does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (Ice machine second floor) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was turned off and placed out of order. Ice machine must be cleaned and sanitized prior to use. Establishment is to send photos of cleaned ice machine to RIDOH once cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025

The door to the outside, located in the basement (overhead door), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

The dishwasher at the main bar, was observed in poor repair no sanitizer dispensing. Establishment set up three bay sink at time of inspection. Chlorine tested at 50-100ppm New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the three bay and dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2025
The ceiling tiles in the upstairs event room are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025
